name: sobrecito
description: Sobre — nomina confidencial sobre Stellar/Soroban con ZK. Monorepo poliglota (web + ZK/Rust + ops).

scripts.zk:setup:regen: cd packages/zk && REGEN_KEYS=1 cargo build -p circuits
scripts.zk:test: cd packages/zk && cargo test -p soroban-utils -p pool -p circuits
scripts.zk:test:proofs: cd packages/zk && BUILD_TESTS=1 cargo test -p circuits -- --ignored
scripts.pool:build: cd packages/zk && VERIFIER_VK_JSON="$PWD/testdata/policy_tx_1_8_vk.json" cargo build -p pool --target wasm32v1-none
scripts.contracts:build: cd packages/zk && VERIFIER_VK_JSON="$PWD/testdata/policy_tx_1_8_vk.json" stellar contract build --manifest-path Cargo.toml --out-dir target/stellar --optimize
